title: Archipelago Additions
description: Expanding the number of dragons in the Isle of Berk mod.
body:
AA is an expansion for the Isle of Berk mod which adds many additional dragons. This is facilitated by Nord_Act's Isle of Berk Variant Loader, which allows us to add remodelled variants of existing dragons without replacing those which are already present. This means, however, that abilities may be mismatched.

Configs must be extracted from the zip in which they are contained and installed as per usual config methods.

Bug reports and support forums are to be found in our Discord server.

AA is a project made by LuckiestLycan, Mqzikeen, SakuraBabochka, Gecko_sauce, DragonTamer, Blue, and Mako. It contains assets by Ness, Immersed, VLS, Chrys, and Will (of the NBD (New Berk's Dawn) team), and MazingA, GrayDoesn'tExist, Roar, SomeGuy, and MilqyWay (of the NBD community). It also contains variant designs by AmiEpyk, JayJay, DragoFRN, Suki, GrayDoesn’tExist, LIA, Mittens, and Skeley-Arts. Our license is and shall remain ARR, to protect these assets of which we have use and distribution permissions but not ownership. Most dragon models use IoB models as a base due to hardcoded rigging dependencies making it impractical to scratch model. AA does not claim to have made these models, they were created by the IoB team and now belong to NBD. We are permitted use of these IoB base assets provided we remain as an addon to IoB and/or NBD and do not claim to have made them. *These credits may change as necessary. They will always be correct to the most recent release of this modpack.*
